text:
About this template

Pulse is a premium doctor-appointment booking platform built with React and the Klar visual CMS. It lets patients browse verified specialists, check real-time availability, and book a slot in seconds — all without a single phone call.

The template ships with a complete three-column booking interface: a mini-calendar with time-slot grid on the left, a searchable and filterable doctor list in the middle, and a rich doctor detail panel with reviews and two-week availability on the right. A confirmation modal collects the patient's phone number for optional SMS reminders.

Key features

  • Google sign-in via the Klar Users SDK — no auth backend to configure
  • Shared appointments collection with server-side no-overlap enforcement, making double-booking impossible
  • Timezone-aware date layer so slot times, the calendar, and reminder emails always render in the clinic's local time
  • Automated email and SMS notifications — booking confirmations, 24-hour reminders, and cancellation notices — provisioned automatically for the project owner
  • Per-user settings (theme, notifications) stored privately in Klar user.data
  • A built-in Admin panel (project owner only) for viewing all booking-app users, editing their appointments, and managing saved data
  • Light and dark themes with a no-flash inline script that applies the last-used theme before first paint
  • Fully responsive — the sidebar collapses to a bottom nav bar on mobile and the detail panel slides in as an overlay on smaller screens

How it works

Every appointment is stored as a row in a shared Klar collection with fields for the doctor, patient, time, treatment, and patient notes. Availability is computed by reading each doctor's confirmed slots for a given day through a narrow equality query — never a full-table scan — so performance stays consistent as the appointment volume grows. The clinic's timezone is a shared setting stored in a config collection; every signed-in user reads it so the entire app reasons in one zone.

To customise this template, swap the doctor list, specialties, treatments, and time slots defined near the top of the script. The design tokens (colours, spacing, radii, shadows) are CSS variables on :root and [data-theme="dark"], so rebranding is a matter of changing a handful of values. Connect your Klar project by setting PROJECT_ID and KLAR_HOST.
name: klar-doctor-appointment
title: Doctor Appointment Booking
author: Klar
description: Pulse is a doctor-appointment booking platform built with React and the Klar visual CMS. Patients browse verified specialists, pick a time slot, and book in seconds — with server-side double-booking prevention, automated email/SMS reminders, and a built-in admin panel.
